tables.description: This data table contains Social Network data for Original and Offspring cohorts that has been reviewed through 2008. The time interval includes Original Cohort exams 12, 16, 19, 21, 23, 24, 26, 29 and Offspring Cohort exams 1 - 8. Included are variables that describe the relationship of the ego and alter (n=1 variable), the dates and reasons the tie was initiated or severed (n=4 variables), the distance between the ego and alter (n=8 variables), and the Treiman occupational prestige score for the ego and the alter (n=16 variables).

variables.name: ALTERTYPE
variables.description: DESCRIBES THE RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN EGO AND ALTER

variables.name: ALTER_TREIMAN1
variables.description: ALTER TREIMAN OCCUPATIONAL PRESTIGE SCORE - WAVE 1

variables.name: alteridtype
variables.description: ALTER COHORT IDENTIFIER

variables.description: FRAMINGHAM HEART STUDY COHORT IDENTIFIER

variables.name: sharealterid
variables.description: ALTER SHARe ID NUMBER

variables.description: FRAMINGHAM HEART STUDY PARTICIPANT SHARe ID NUMBER

variables.name: consent_1214
variables.description: Subject consent for true Framingham participants. Consents are missing for non-participants.

variables.name: fshare
variables.description: Father ID

variables.name: idtype
variables.description: Refers to the Framingham cohort the sample comes from, useful to identify which files phenotypes will be found

variables.name: itwin
variables.description: Used to designate IDENTICAL individuals within families. The pairs within families have the same number, so that the first identical pair are both designated as 1, the second pair are both designated as 2, there are no families at present with more than two pairs of identical twins.

variables.name: mshare
variables.description: Mother ID

variables.name: pedno
variables.description: The family number, present for all subjects found in the pedigree file, and absent for those not included in the pedigree file.

variables.name: sex
variables.description: Gender

variables.name: shareid
variables.description: SHARe ID number

variables.name: twinid
variables.description: Twin ID, where twins share the same IDs.

variables.name: consent_1214
variables.description: Subject consent for true Framingham participants. Consents are missing for non-participants.

variables.name: geno_1214
variables.description: Equals one if subject appears in SHARe genotype files (phs000342).

variables.name: idtype
variables.description: Refers to the Framingham cohort the sample comes from, useful to identify which files phenotypes will be found

variables.name: shareid
variables.description: SHARe ID number

tables.description: This data table contains the time lapsed between an arbitrary date and Exam 1 date for Social Network file (vr_sntwk_2008_m_0641s), Original, Offspring, NOS, and Generation 3 Cohorts through 2008.

variables.name: LAPSE
variables.description: The number of months between the participant's exam 1 date and an arbitrary date.

variables.name: idtype
variables.description: Framingham Heart Study cohort identifier

variables.name: shareid
variables.description: Framingham Heart Study participant SHARe ID number
